title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-21
body:
The moderation team has completed a full review of the abuse queue. Here is a summary of actions taken:

**Bans (2)**
- spam_wave_42 — Permanently banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes.
- toxic_runner — Permanently banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

**Warnings (2)**
- new_member_17 — Warned for an off-topic post in #introductions. Please keep posts relevant to the channel.
- bot_like_user_77 — Warned for repeated near-identical automated-looking replies in help channels. Further review pending.

**No Action (2)**
- trusted_helper (report_003) — Report closed. The report arose from a moderation disagreement; no policy violation found.
- core_maintainer (report_006) — Report closed. Confirmed false positive resulting from a coordinated mass-report by brigading users following a legitimate moderation decision.

All 6 reports have been closed. If you have concerns about any of these decisions, please contact the moderation team through the appropriate channels.
